columns.extraction_plan: The progression-free survival rate for the treatment arm (SOC + AAP) is reported in Table 2, under the "Progression-free survival" section, as "% event-free at 5 years (95% CI)". The value is 54% (50-59). The hazard ratio for SOC + AAP versus SOC-alone is 0.58 (95% CI: 0.49-0.69), P < .0001.

The progression-free survival rate for the control arm (SOC-alone) is reported in Table 2, under the "Progression-free survival" section, as "% event-free at 5 years (95% CI)". The value is 37% (33-42). The hazard ratio for SOC + AAP versus SOC-alone is 0.58 (95% CI: 0.49-0.69), P < .0001.
